settings.headline: Quietly crafted goods for everyday use.
settings.subhead: Small-batch objects, sourced responsibly and shipped to your door. Updated weekly as new things come in from the workshop.

settings.heading: This week's picks
settings.subheading: Six pieces the studio is leaning on right now.

settings.heading: What you get
settings.subheading: Every shipment leaves the studio on the same terms.

settings.heading: Free shipping
settings.body: Orders over $75 ship free, anywhere in the world.

settings.heading: Responsibly sourced
settings.body: Materials traced to workshops we've visited in person.

settings.heading: Lifetime repair
settings.body: Hardware failure? Send it back, we'll make it right.

settings.heading: Plastic-free packaging
settings.body: Kraft paper, cotton twine, a letter from the maker.

settings.heading: What customers say
settings.subheading: A handful of notes from the last six months.

settings.quote: Genuinely the most thoughtful packaging I've seen this year.
settings.author: Maya K.

settings.quote: Two years in and it still looks the day I bought it.
settings.author: Jordan P.

settings.quote: Replaced five cheaper versions with this one. Worth every dollar.
settings.author: Aisha O.

settings.heading: Questions, answered
settings.subheading: Anything else — ask us, we read every email.

settings.question: Where do you ship from?
settings.answer: Everything goes out of our studio in Portland, Oregon, typically within 48 hours.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30 days, no questions asked. We'll email a prepaid label.

settings.question: Do you restock sold-out pieces?
settings.answer: Sometimes — join the newsletter for restock notes.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale?
settings.answer: Yes, email wholesale@ with your shop and we'll follow up within a week.

settings.heading: Stay in the loop
settings.subhead: Restocks, new arrivals, and the occasional letter from the studio.
